summary: Full backend and frontend testing of SK+ PRO SaaS app. 12/13 backend tests passed (1 infra issue), all frontend flows working.

minor.issue: Endpoint not under /api prefix so public URL routes to frontend HTML instead of backend JSON. Internally works fine. Consider moving to /api/health or accepting this behavior.

issues: Metric cards show '—' dash placeholder - appears to be loading state that may persist if API returns 0 values. Verify values display correctly when non-zero data exists.

action_items: Optional: Move /health to /api/health for public accessibility, or document that /health is internal-only
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 23: MONGO_URL has a default fallback value (hardcoded), per guidelines it should fail fast without default
JWT_SECRET has a hardcoded default value - security concern for production
Modal dialog selector (role=dialog) may not be set on the modal component - minor testability issue
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Lider (test_lider_unique@skplus.com.br) and TEST User UI (test_ui_user@skplus.com.br) during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows tested and working: login, dashboard metrics, sidebar navigation (Dashboard/Tarefas/Contas/Logs/Configurações/Usuários), user creation, conta creation, logout. Backend APIs all functional. Only issue is /health not publicly accessible (not under /api prefix).
